auth.label: API Token
auth.description: NocoDB API token sent in the xc-token header. Create or copy a personal API token from your NocoDB account settings: https://docs.nocodb.com/product-docs/account-settings/api-tokens.

extraFields.label: NocoDB Base URL
extraFields.description: The root URL of your NocoDB Cloud or self-hosted instance, such as https://app.nocodb.com or https://nocodb.example.com.

actions.name: count_records
actions.description: Count records in one NocoDB table, optionally filtered by a where expression.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

where.description: A NocoDB where expression, such as (Status,eq,Done).

viewId.description: The NocoDB view ID used to restrict records to a specific view.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for counting records in one NocoDB table.

count.description: The number of records matching the query.

actions.name: count_table_records
actions.description: Count records in one NocoDB table using the v3 data API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

where.description: A NocoDB v3 where expression, such as (Status,eq,Done).

viewId.description: The NocoDB view ID used to restrict records to a specific view.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for counting records through the NocoDB v3 data API.

count.description: The number of records matching the query.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB v3 record count response.

actions.name: create_records
actions.description: Create one or more records in a NocoDB table.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

items.description: A NocoDB record payload keyed by table column names or system fields.

rows.description: Records to create in the table.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating NocoDB records.

items.description: A NocoDB record returned by the API.

actions.name: create_table
actions.description: Create a table in a NocoDB base using the v3 metadata API.

anyOf.description: The table description.

items.description: A field to create with a new NocoDB table.

fields.description: Fields to create with the table.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a NocoDB table.

table_name.description: The physical table name, when returned.

actions.name: create_table_field
actions.description: Create a field in a NocoDB table using the v3 metadata API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

field.description: The NocoDB v3 field creation payload.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a NocoDB table field.

field.description: A NocoDB v3 field metadata object.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB table field creation response.

actions.name: create_table_records
actions.description: Create one or more records in a NocoDB table using the v3 data API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

fields.description: Record field values keyed by field title or field ID.

records.description: Records to create in the table.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating records through the NocoDB v3 data API.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

id_fields.description: Primary key field values for the record.

fields.description: Record field values excluding primary key fields.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB v3 record creation response.

actions.name: create_table_view
actions.description: Create a view for a NocoDB table using the v3 metadata API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

view.description: The NocoDB v3 view creation payload.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a NocoDB table view.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB table view creation response.

actions.name: delete_records
actions.description: Delete one or more records from a NocoDB table.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

items.description: A NocoDB record payload keyed by table column names or system fields.

rows.description: Records to delete. Each record must include its NocoDB record ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting NocoDB records.

deleted.description: Whether NocoDB accepted the delete request.

items.description: A NocoDB record returned by the API.

rows.description: Deleted records returned by NocoDB when available.

actions.name: delete_table
actions.description: Delete a NocoDB table using the v3 metadata API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a NocoDB table.

deleted.description: Whether NocoDB accepted the delete request.

actions.name: delete_table_records
actions.description: Delete one or more records from a NocoDB table using the v3 data API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

items.description: A NocoDB v3 record delete payload.

records.description: Records to delete from the table.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting records through the NocoDB v3 data API.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

id_fields.description: Primary key field values for the record.

fields.description: Record field values excluding primary key fields.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB v3 record deletion response.

actions.name: get_base_schema
actions.description: Get schema metadata for one NocoDB base.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one NocoDB base schema.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the NocoDB user associated with the connected API token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading the current NocoDB user.

actions.name: get_table_metadata
actions.description: Get metadata for one NocoDB table, including columns and views when available.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading NocoDB table metadata.

table_name.description: The physical table name, when returned.

column_name.description: The physical column name, when returned.

actions.name: list_bases
actions.description: List bases visible to the connected NocoDB API token.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing NocoDB bases.

actions.name: list_records
actions.description: List records from one NocoDB table with optional where, sort, field, limit, and offset parameters.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

limit.description: The maximum number of records to return.

where.description: A NocoDB where expression, such as (Status,eq,Done).

sort.description: A comma-separated sort expression. Prefix a field with - for descending sort.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of fields to include.

viewId.description: The NocoDB view ID used to restrict records to a specific view.

shuffle.description: Whether to shuffle the returned records.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing records in one NocoDB table.

items.description: A NocoDB record returned by the API.

totalRows.description: The total number of matching rows.

isFirstPage.description: Whether the current page is the first page.

isLastPage.description: Whether the current page is the last page.

anyOf.description: Pagination metadata returned by NocoDB.

actions.name: list_table_records
actions.description: List records from one NocoDB table using the v3 data API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

page.description: The one-based page number to retrieve.

nestedPage.description: The one-based page number for nested linked record data.

pageSize.description: The maximum number of records to return.

where.description: A NocoDB v3 where expression, such as (Status,eq,Done).

fields.description: A comma-separated list or JSON array string of fields to include.

viewId.description: The NocoDB view ID used to restrict records to a specific view.

linksAsLtar.description: Whether Links fields should return full linked record data.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing records through the NocoDB v3 data API.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

id_fields.description: Primary key field values for the record.

fields.description: Record field values excluding primary key fields.

anyOf.description: The pagination token for the next page.
The pagination token for the previous page.
The nested pagination token for the next page.
The nested pagination token for the previous page.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB v3 record list response.

actions.name: list_table_views
actions.description: List views for a NocoDB table using the v3 metadata API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing NocoDB table views.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB table view list response.

actions.name: list_tables
actions.description: List tables in a NocoDB base or in a specific base source.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing NocoDB tables.

table_name.description: The physical table name, when returned.

actions.name: read_record
actions.description: Read one record from a NocoDB table by record ID.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

fields.description: A comma-separated list of fields to include.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one NocoDB record.

row.description: A NocoDB record returned by the API.

actions.name: read_table_record
actions.description: Read one record from a NocoDB table using the v3 data API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

fields.description: A comma-separated list or JSON array string of fields to include.

linksAsLtar.description: Whether Links fields should return full linked record data.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one record through the NocoDB v3 data API.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

id_fields.description: Primary key field values for the record.

fields.description: Record field values excluding primary key fields.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB v3 record read response.

actions.name: update_records
actions.description: Update one or more records in a NocoDB table.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

items.description: A NocoDB record payload keyed by table column names or system fields.

rows.description: Records to update. Each record must include its NocoDB record ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating NocoDB records.

items.description: A NocoDB record returned by the API.

actions.name: update_table
actions.description: Update a NocoDB table title, description, display field, or metadata using the v3 metadata API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

displayFieldId.description: The field ID to use as the table display field.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a NocoDB table.

table_name.description: The physical table name, when returned.

actions.name: update_table_records
actions.description: Update one or more records in a NocoDB table using the v3 data API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

items.description: A NocoDB v3 record update payload.

records.description: Records to update in the table.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating records through the NocoDB v3 data API.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

id_fields.description: Primary key field values for the record.

fields.description: Record field values excluding primary key fields.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB v3 record update response.

actions.name: upsert_table_records
actions.description: Create or update records in a NocoDB table by matching up to three fields using the v3 data API.

tableId.description: The NocoDB table ID, such as m1abcdefghijk.

fieldsToMergeOn.description: Field titles or IDs used to match existing records.

fields.description: Record field values keyed by field title or field ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for upserting records through the NocoDB v3 data API.

anyOf.description: The NocoDB record ID as a string.
The NocoDB record ID as a number.

id_fields.description: Primary key field values for the record.

fields.description: Record field values excluding primary key fields.

outputSchema.description: The NocoDB v3 record upsert response.
